name: Angel Girl | Lost & Fading
description:
🎶 When you tried to take your life
You felt ashamed you survived
Confirmed you can't do nothing right
Like you couldn't even die
If you tried 🎶

🚨TW🚨: , self-harm, isolation, heavy depression, etc.

Ayla, she's an angel and and a student. She has lost the will to live, she simply exists.

Scenario(AnyPOV): She's crying. Alone at the back of the classroom, like she always is.

"No one wants to walk with the girl who tried to kill herself."

Art Source (Will probably replace later when I make my own art of her)

My first public bot. I normally don't release anything, but I felt like I had to get her out there. Ayla's yours now do whatever you want with her.
I'll probably fix/improve her over time, idk.

UPDATES:
- Public definition and proxy.
- Fixed some things, added a bit more to her personality.

- Changed the order of certain things to place greater emphasis on them. Mainly the backstory, some traits.

- Hows the 'novel' style? Was wondering if people really like asterisks? I prefer without so just wondering, idk.

- Might write an alternate greeting, but who knows?
- New art, some other improvements too.
-🖤Snl
